author: srikanth C.
pros: I have started using this system from last 5 months, its very user friendly and easy to use. I need to talk about their Outlook plug-in Functionality, it has reduced my submission time from 20mins effort to less than 15 Secs. I can see all my submission statuses at one place and very easy to track the details.
cons: Nothing much to say at this time, Looking for new features

description: Its the best software till now which results in good profit for the company. I learnt many things from this software which enhanced my search strings capability.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: the software is very easy to use therefore my recommendation for this software is to everyone out there , The software is very easy to use which has good filters which results in good outcome
cons: The filters should be more refined as sometimes i feel is complex in some way therefore its not a major issue and can be solved in further upgrade i hope.

review_title: Few Bugs which are still not resolved.
description: Oorwin is good as per the pricing but its customer care response is too slow. I have raised the above mentioned issues earlier as well but no attention payed towards these bugs.
author: Nomaan A.
pros: Mass Emailing feature. Ease of use. Light software, dont push alot of pressure on Computer ram and processor.
cons: Composing of email while mass emailing. There is blank space at the very left corner of the email template column. While mentioning the Email Subject, many of the times I click on the blank space and the whole email window gets closed. Secondly, while searching candidates in the internal database, you cannot put a string like AND/OR in the job title. You would rather have to put one single keyword in the Job Title while searching in the internal database. Thirdly, there is no option that I can route the profile of a candidate to my email or some other's email.

description: I'm happy to use this software for job postings, interviews updates and onboarding
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Ease of use, Job postings, resume search, Interview update and onboarding
cons: Flexibility, Ease of use, Job postings, resume search, Interview update and onboarding

review_title: Very User Friendly and very satisfied
description: Very User Friendly and can access able in one day
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: we are into recruitment and staffing, Data Base is a really important for us, Oorwin helped to search candidates easily and suitable for the requirement and also it shows similar profiles
cons: Some of the requirements need multiple language speakers and some are either or, Oorwin need to focus on that a bit more
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
